title: 配置虚拟机串口连接命名管道
output:
INFO created VM path=\\WIN-OMK556K17QL\root\virtualization\v2:Msvm_ComputerSystem.CreationClassName="Msvm_ComputerSystem",Name="E7234945-1558-4D79-9298-E07D9F9BDCA9"
INFO serial port count=2
INFO serial ElementName=COM 1 InstanceID=Microsoft:E7234945-...\0 ResourceSubType=Microsoft:Hyper-V:Serial Port
INFO serial ElementName=COM 2 InstanceID=Microsoft:E7234945-...\1 ResourceSubType=Microsoft:Hyper-V:Serial Port
INFO modifying serial ElementName=COM 1
INFO ModifyResourceSettings rv=0 immediate
READBACK Connection=\\.\pipe\WMITEST_serial_com_pipe
ASSERT PASS Connection matches expected pipe path
CLEANUP DestroySystem rv=4096
notes: 第二代虚拟机创建后默认即有 2 个串口（COM 1、COM 2），无需 AddResourceSettings；直接从 VSSD 经 GetRelated('Msvm_SerialPortSettingData') 取得已存在的 RASD 修改即可。
关键属性为 Connection（string[] 数组），继承自 CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData，并非 Msvm_SerialPortSettingData 自身声明。该类自身仅显式声明 DebuggerMode 属性。
Connection 须赋字符串数组 @('\\.\pipe\NAME')。命名管道路径格式为 \\.\pipe\<name>（本地管道）或 \\<server>\pipe\<name>（远程）。
ResourceSubType 为 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Serial Port'。COM 1 的 InstanceID 以 \0 结尾，COM 2 以 \1 结尾。
ModifyResourceSettings 通常返回 0 并立即生效；返回 4096 时按 Job 轮询。
ModifyResourceSettings 仅修改单个资源；修改后用相同的 GetRelated 重取，并按 InstanceID 匹配读回验证。
title_en: Configure a Virtual Machine Serial Port to Connect to a Named Pipe
notes_en: After a Generation 2 virtual machine is created, it has 2 serial ports (COM 1, COM 2) by default, with no need for AddResourceSettings; simply obtain the existing RASD from the VSSD via GetRelated('Msvm_SerialPortSettingData') and modify it.

The key property is Connection (a string[] array), inherited from CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData rather than declared by Msvm_SerialPortSettingData itself. That class only explicitly declares the DebuggerMode property.
Connection must be assigned a string array @('\\.\pipe\NAME'). The named pipe path format is \\.\pipe\<name> (local pipe) or \\<server>\pipe\<name> (remote).
The ResourceSubType is 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Serial Port'. COM 1's InstanceID ends with \0, and COM 2's ends with \1.
ModifyResourceSettings usually returns 0 and takes effect immediately; when it returns 4096, poll the Job.
ModifyResourceSettings modifies only a single resource; after modification, re-obtain it with the same GetRelated and verify the read-back by matching on InstanceID.
